description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, test, prepare and deploy, using a cache keyed by $CI_JOB_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG that stores the vendor directory and defining global variables BUNDLE_JOBS, BUNDLE_PATH and MOUNT_POINT. In the prepare stage add a coverage job that runs on ruby:3.4, executes `gem install simplecov --no-doc`, rewrites coverage resultset paths with `find coverage -name "*resultset.json" -exec sed -i 's?/home?'`pwd`'?' {} \;`, runs `rake coverage:report`, and publishes the coverage/ directory as an artifact with a coverage regex; also add an image job using docker/compose:latest (no script). In the test stage add lint rubocop code (ruby:3.4, `bundle install` then `bundle exec rake rubocop` with BUNDLE_WITHOUT), lint rubocop wiki (clones the wiki, creates a custom .rubocop-wiki.yml, runs `bundle exec rubocop httpx.wiki --config .rubocop-wiki.yml`, runs only on schedule), a regression tests job (apt‑get update && apt‑get install libmagic-dev shared-mime-info, `bundle install`, `bundle exec rake regression_tests`, artifacts coverage/), and multiple spec jobs named test jruby 10, test jruby 9, test ruby 2/7, test ruby 3/0, test ruby 3/1, test ruby 3/2, test ruby 3/3, test ruby 3/4 (with a parallel matrix over RUBYOPT '' and --yjit) and test truffleruby, all using docker:latest with docker:dind service, a before_script that logs into the registry, run `./spec.sh <engine> <version>` (e.g. `./spec.sh ruby 3.4`), collect coverage/ artifacts, set BUNDLE_WITHOUT per job, allow_failure for some jobs and restrict test ruby 3/0 and 3/1 to the master branch. In the deploy stage add a pages job (ruby:3.4, needs coverage, `gem install hanna-nouveau`, `rake prepare_website`, copy coverage to public/, artifacts public, rdoc, wiki, data, coverage, runs only on master) and a release job using the release‑cli image that needs the prepare_release artifact, creates a release with description $EXTRA_DESCRIPTION, name Release $TAG, tag $TAG, but is disabled by a rule that never runs on tags; also add a prepare_release job that generates a variables.env file with EXTRA_DESCRIPTION and TAG from the git tag and publishes it as a dotenv artifact, but is also disabled on tags.
